title: Performance Optimization Pass
description: Profile and optimize application performance. Targets: <100ms initial render, <16ms frame time, <50MB memory baseline. Optimize: React re-renders (memo, useMemo), canvas animation efficiency, SQLite query performance, WebSocket message batching. Create performance budget and monitoring.
acceptance_criteria: Initial render under 100ms (measured via Performance API)
Memory usage under 50MB at idle, under 200MB with 10 agents
SQLite queries complete in <10ms for typical operations
React DevTools shows no unnecessary re-renders
Performance budget documented and enforced in CI
agent_output: PERFORMANCE.md with React optimizations (memoization, virtualization), Rust async I/O, SQLite indexing recommendations, build optimizations, benchmarks, and profiling tools.
